metadata.description: Claude Code skills for Ascend NPU inference, model quantization, LLM evaluation, and structured Git commits

plugins.name: ascend
plugins.description: Ascend NPU hardware entry point — health check, environment setup, shell script template. Starting point for any Ascend workflow.

plugins.name: vllm-ascend
plugins.description: vLLM-Ascend serving toolchain — install, offline validation, scenario tuning, online serving, contribution guide.

plugins.name: model-download
plugins.description: Download models from ModelScope or HuggingFace to local storage before inference, quantization, or evaluation.

plugins.name: msmodelslim
plugins.description: Model quantization on Ascend NPUs — W4A8/W8A8/W4A4, one-click and custom YAML, MoE mixed precision, VLM support, accuracy recovery.

plugins.name: aisbench
plugins.description: AISBench evaluation framework — accuracy benchmarks (GSM8K, MMLU, AIME) and performance benchmarks against vLLM services.

plugins.name: gitcode-publish
plugins.description: Publish model README to GitCode with auto-inferred YAML frontmatter tags from HuggingFace/ModelScope API and local transformers config.

plugins.name: pythonic-code
plugins.description: Review Python code for idiomatic style and suggest improvements. Flags unpythonic patterns and applies refactors.

plugins.name: commit-as-prompt
plugins.description: Structured Git commits with WHAT/WHY/HOW format, optimized as AI context for future sessions.

plugins.name: python-with-uv
plugins.description: Set up a Python project with uv — pyproject.toml, Aliyun mirror, ruff linting, pre-commit hooks.

plugins.name: setup-neovim-plugin
plugins.description: Configure a Neovim plugin from GitHub — fetches docs via context7, writes minimal init.lua/init.vim config, updates README.md in Chinese.

plugins.name: msmodeling
plugins.description: MindStudio-Modeling performance evaluation framework for Ascend NPUs. Provides tensor-cast for model-level analysis and serving-cast-simulation for LLM serving parameter tuning.
